Before you submit an issue read the rules section first.
RULES:
====================================
it is required to provide a screenshot/image of the bug.
it is required to provide a clear step by step
it is required to provide a clear description of the issue.
it is optional to Include steps to reproduce the issue if possible.
failure to meet the rules standards your issue will be closed.
====================================
